posts.title: The Evolution of the Three-Point Shot
posts.summary: How the game has changed from the paint to the perimeter.
posts.content: Basketball has seen a massive shift in strategy over the last decade. The three-point shot, once a gimmick, is now the primary weapon of championship teams...

posts.content: From windmills to posterizers, this season has delivered some of the best dunks we've seen in years. Let's break down the top 5...
